channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Blood4Blood: BKFC, Danny Wimmer And 5B Take A Swing At Bare-Knuckle And Heavy Metal Fusion
item.description: BKFC and Danny Wimmer Presents are partnering for Blood4Blood, a May 6 event combining bare-knuckle fights and heavy metal in Daytona Beach.

item.title: ‘Marathon’ Deserves To Be More Than Just An Extraction Shooter
item.description: Bungie's new game, Marathon, deserves to have more modes than just the core extraction shooter.

item.title: Viral deepfake ad casts Musk, Bezos, and Altman as corpulent overlords powering AI on human sweat. Its creator says the best jokes tell the truth
item.description: The viral AI ad imagines laid-off workers pedaling bikes to power the technology that replaced them.

item.title: Goldman’s top strategist warns stocks are flashing the same warning signs as before the 2008 financial crisis
item.description: Peter Oppenheimer—who correctly called U.S. underperformance and the global rotation—now sees elevated risk of a correction.

item.title: Private sector added 63,000 jobs in February, above expectations, ADP says
item.description: The figure reported on Wednesday is above economists’ estimates of an increase of 50,000 jobs and higher than the prior month’s revised reading of a g...

item.title: Trump’s $175 billion illegal tariff revenue is now accruing interest, and refund delays could be costing American taxpayers $700 million a month
item.description: “Consumers will be the biggest losers here,” a Cato Institute economist told Fortune.

item.title: The average American teacher makes $72,000, but one in three are so broke they’re taking on side hustles like Uber driving
item.description: Teaching is seen as an AI-proof career by Gen Z—but with the American Dream becoming more out of reach, educators have turned to second jobs to make e...

item.title: Scout’s Chief Digs In On Direct Sales
item.description: Scout Motors president and CEO Scott Keogh weighs in on plans to sell direct to consumers and lays out the case for the brand's electrified pickup and...

item.title: McDonald’s CEO Eats Burger, Gets Roasted By Burger King In Viral Post
item.description: Recently, a clip known as “McDonald’s CEO eats burger” racked up 145,000 shares in a day for the wrong reasons.

item.title: MacBook Neo Hands-On: The 5 Things Apple Cut To Hit The ‘Breakthrough’ $599 Price Tag
item.description: Apple has revealed the MacBook Neo, its most affordable laptop. Here’s what it looks and feels like in person.

item.title: USDA credits Trump trade deals as agricultural deficit shrinks, farm sector gains ground
item.description: The USDA reports a drop in the agricultural trade deficit from $43.7 billion to $29 billion in 2026. Officials credit President Donald Trump's trade d...

item.title: Uber CEO says his ‘really demanding’ work culture includes expecting employees to answer his emails over the weekend: ‘Don’t come here if you want to coast’
item.description: Uber boss Dara Khosrowshahi says the most important skill in life is working hard: “I’m not going to let anyone outwork me.”

item.title: Nasdaq leads stocks higher in final hour, VIX plummets despite Mideast conflict
U.S. economy got off to a choppy start in 2026, Fed ‘beige book’ finds
There have never been so many 401(k) millionaires. (They’re in for a test.)
This billionaire Tesla investor just bought a million shares of Nvidia
Stocks shift into rally mode after White House tamps down crude-oil surge
Blue state loses over 180,000 residents in past 5 years as high taxes weigh
item.description: Massachusetts lost about 182,000 residents to domestic out-migration from April 2020 to July 2025, according to a Pioneer Institute analysis of the st...

item.title: eBay cuts 800 jobs across company operations just days after dropping $1.2B on trendy Gen Z fashion app
item.description: While eBay might be trying to tailor itself to new customer demographics, the company announced it would be cutting 6%, or 800 roles, across its globa...

item.title: FedEx says it will return any tariff refunds to customers, shippers who paid them
item.description: FedEx said it will return any tariff refunds it receives to the shippers and customers who paid them after Trump's IEEPA tariffs were struck down as i...

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
